ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration */,
  "default_value" INTEGER /* Default value for the configuration */,
  "is_dynamic" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the configuration is dynamic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "config_group" TEXT /* Group that the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_subgroup" TEXT /* Subgroup that the configuration belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_triggers" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event trigger */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration that triggers the event */,
  "trigger_time" INTEGER /* Time at which the event is triggered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "trigger_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the event is triggered */,
  "trigger_type" TEXT /* Type of trigger */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data required for the event */,
  "event_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_triggers_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES game_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who started the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the session started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the session ended */,
  "session_length" INTEGER /* Length of the session in minutes */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game that was played during the session */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the game that was played during the session */,
  "game_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the game during the session */,
  "session_rating" TEXT /* Rating given to the session by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  "login_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event log */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session in which the event occurred */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event that was triggered */,
  "trigger_time" TEXT /* Time when the event was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event */,
  "event_result" TEXT /* Result of the event */,
  "event_data" TEXT /* Additional data logged during the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_triggers ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dynamic_configurations" (
  "dynamic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dynamic configuration */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session in which the adjustment was made */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration that was adjusted */,
  "adjusted_value" INTEGER /* Adjusted value of the configuration */,
  "adjustment_time" TEXT /* Time when the adjustment was made */,
  "adjusted_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dynamic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dynamic_configurations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dynamic_configurations_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES game_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session in which the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_time" TEXT /* Time when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system notification */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game session in which the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "send_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_notifications_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role that has this permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "features" TEXT /* New features introduced in the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "version_changelog" TEXT /* List of changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game update */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game version that was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_time" TEXT /* Time when the update was made */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_updates_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES game_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_saved_states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each saved state */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who saved the state */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game that was saved */,
  "save_time" TEXT /* Time when the state was saved */,
  "state_data" TEXT /* Saved game state data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_saved_states_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_saved_states_game_version FOREIGN KEY ("game_version") REFERENCES game_versions ("version_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the game that the leaderboard is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who has a score on the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Player's score on the leaderboard */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Player's rank on the leaderboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
